title: Option to add a Calendar to My Work
excerpt: I know I have all assignments assigned to me in the My Work tab however could I make it to where it not only shows me that information but all have a calendar as well.

posts.author: Ariesence (Laketa Kinya Jackson)
posts.cookedHtml: I know I have all assignments assigned to me in the My Work tab however could I make it to where it not only shows me that information but all have a calendar as well.

posts.author: Michaela_Schwartz (Michaela)
posts.cookedHtml: This is a HUGE missed feature. Why can’t we create custom and dynamic board views for My Work?

posts.author: Jessica_of_Mars (Jessica Champneys)
posts.cookedHtml: I have found an incredibly messy and tedious way to manually create a “my work” calendar, but it only works on the browser version. The mobile app is completely useless to me until a calendar view is created for My Work. I don’t/won’t use the app until this feature is added.

posts.author: VirtualVines (Roberto)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi guys!

Yes, we have the solution. Our app, MyWeek, allows you to view activities in a calendar view of a week and choose the column people from your boards.

Key Features:

  • Centralize all activities in one dynamic weekly view
  • Customize your week to start on any day
  • Hide weekends for streamlined work planning
  • Group activities by project boards for perfect organization
  • Effortlessly drag and resize schedule items
  • Personalize your view with flexible columns (date/timeline, people & status)
  • Create and edit activities directly within the app
  • Navigate instantly to any day or week with our intuitive calendar

Look for “MyWeek” in monday’s marketplace.
